creator: joris@vandalon.nl
text:
I've bought a HighPoint RocketRAID 620 which was not working properly in Freebsd 8.2 nor 8-STABLE.
It seemed that this devices id was not known in ahci.c so I added add.

Fix: Add "{0x91251b4b, 0x00, "HighPoint RocketRAID 620",  AHCI_Q_NOBSYRES}," to ahci.ko.
(Patch included)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Get a HighPoint RocketRAID 620 with device id 0x91251b4b and load ahci.ko on boot.
